title: CSAC
description: Coordination Sphere Analysis and Comparison (CSAC) is a Python workflow for analyzing metal-binding environments in protein structures. This repository snapshot includes the core CSAC extraction scripts together with the downstream statistics and figure-generation scripts used for the Fe-binding aerobic-versus-anaerobic manuscript.

creators.name: Jelen, Benjamin I.
creators.affiliation: Rowan University; The University of Texas at Austin
